Author: lordkomet10
Content:
@Kippy Im going to tell you  a story:
It once was a small server named 50xCreative it grew and grew until a player stumbled upon it and decided to apply for staff he then got developer and started straight away he created the lore which keeps on going. He created the many commands and features we love and need to this day. He is what attracts players without him we dont have 50x. He is Kundaliel and he is 50xCreative

We want you but we need Kundaliel because without him we dont have the 50x we love and which you want to continue and listen to the community we are the community and we want Kundaliel of course he might troll but he also knows how to run the server. Egono sure he is a dev too but he never did exactly what Kundaliel did.
While everyone was absent Kundaliel made random giveaways and had a genuine heart open for 50xCreative.

Summary: You promised to give the community what it wants and grow the community. To grow the server needs Kundaliel and we need him.
He might have nuked the server but he had a good reason. You banned & demoted him without even asking "why" or "what" you just didnt even give him an attempt to explain with the way your are going about things we wont have 50xCreative in a few days.

You want to make the server great but just gave up without even flinching.
